name: NNat

aliases.name: NNat
aliases.comment:
A natural number (`<= 0`), where you know the exact value.


`NNat.n3` is of type


    NNat (N N3Nat Is (Difference a To (N3NatPlus a)))
This means, its exact value can be described as


  - `N3Nat`


  - the `Diffence` of some `a` to `a` plus 3.
